hooks.command: bash -lc 'payload=$(cat 2>/dev/null || true); [ -n "$payload" ] || exit 0; command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; root=$(pwd -P) || exit 0; [ -x "$root/bin/fm-turnend-guard.sh" ] || exit 0; [ -f "$root/AGENTS.md" ] || exit 0; [ -f "$root/.codex/hooks.json" ] || exit 0; jq -e "any(.hooks.Stop[]?.hooks[]?.command?; type == \"string\" and contains(\"fm-turnend-guard.sh\"))" "$root/.codex/hooks.json" >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; printf "%s" "$payload" | "$root/bin/fm-turnend-guard.sh"'
